name: Entra Privileged Accounts Stale (30 days)
description: Detects privileged entra accounts with stale login activity.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_sign_in_datetime AS last_login FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND (u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL OR u.last_sign_in_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review privileged stale accounts immediately; remove excessive privileges or disable unused access.
